title: epipactis × conquensis
intro: Epipactis × conquensis is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Epipactis palustris and Epipactis helleborine species. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of iridoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Epipactis × conquensis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, thanks to its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
